long_description: A fire alarm or other hazard has required the evacuation of the data center. Remote support will be provided by other data centers until such time as the team are permitted to reenter the premises.
short_description: Facility Provider - Fire Alarm or Other Hazard Requiring Evacuation - SYD01
close_notes: Facility Provider - Site Access Restored - No Service Impact
current_status_next_steps:
Useful links:
Incident Categorization: https://confluence.softlayer.local/x/7DfFAg

False Alarm
